arts.ttl: Real Madrid fear 'Yoro repeat' with top target
arts.sum: The Bayern Munich left-back is out of contract next summer, as Yoro would have been, and the LaLiga champions have positioned themselves to sign him on a free transfer after refusing to make a formal bid during the previous window. According to Relevo, Real Madrid still find themselves in pole position to land Davies, but they are well aware that Premier League clubs are also circling.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Venue : Estadio Santiago Bernabeu, Madrid, Spain. La Liga returns to the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Espanyol
arts.sum: CB: Antonio Rudiger - The charismatic Germany international put Madrid back in front against Stuttgart with his fifth goal for the club. RB: Dani Carvajal - Started the last game in central defence alongside Antonio Rudiger but should revert to his main position, allowing Eder Militao to come into the side while Lucas Vazquez drops out.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Espanyol (4-3-3) : Courtois; Carvajal, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy; Bellingham, Modric, Valverde; Rodrygo, Mbappe, Vinicius. Real Madrid will aim to extend their winning streak to four games in all competitions when they battle Espanyol in La Liga on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'eye' £38m move for highly-rated teenage La Liga defender
arts.sum: Valencia centre-back Yarek Gasiorowski is reportedly firmly on Real Madrid's radar, with a move to Bernabeu potentially occurring next year.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Espanyol in what should be a manageable home game for Los Blancos, who earned a solid 3-1 win against Stuttgart last Tuesday. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Vinicius, Rodrygo, Mbappe.
